translation: In the case (2020) Supreme People's Court Civil Retrial No. 5648, the Supreme People's Court held that the child of the judgment debtor did not have the capacity to pay the purchase price for the house at the time of purchase, and the payment for the house involved in the case was made by the judgment debtor. However, at the time the child of the judgment debtor purchased the house involved in the case, the creditor-debtor relationship between the creditor and the judgment debtor had not yet arisen, and it could not be proven that the judgment debtor's purchase of the house for the child was an act of maliciously evading debts. The house involved in the case was purchased with funds from the debtor couple; at the time of purchase, their adult daughter did not have the financial capacity to purchase a house worth nearly one million yuan, and the actual payer of the house involved in the case was not the registered right holder. Therefore, the court determined that the house involved in the case was family joint property of the debtor couple and their adult daughter, and the share owned by the judgment debtor could be subject to execution.
